# Brian Ward Appraisal — Temecula & Riverside County Real Estate Appraiser

> California Certified Residential Real Estate Appraiser serving Temecula and all of Riverside County since 2004. 20+ years of experience and 7,000+ appraisals completed. Specializing in non-lender appraisals: date-of-death, divorce, estate and trust, bankruptcy, expert witness, pre-purchase, and pre-sale valuations. All reports comply with USPAP.

## Key Facts
- Business: Brian Ward Appraisal
- Appraiser credential: California Certified Residential Real Estate Appraiser
- Phone: (951) 309-2131
- Email: contact@temecula.pro
- Office: 27315 Jefferson Ave #J-143, Temecula, CA 92590
- Service area: All of Riverside County, California (Temecula Valley, Western Riverside, San Gorgonio Pass, San Jacinto Valley, mountain communities, and the Coachella Valley)
- Pricing: Residential appraisals from $299 (Basic Desktop) to $725 (Standard 2–4 Unit). Exact fee quoted before commitment.

## Pricing
- Basic Desktop: $299 — Records-based valuation with no property visit. MLS data, county records, and recent comparable sales analysis.
- Desktop Appraisal: $449 — Enhanced records review, neighborhood analysis, and detailed comparable sales study. No property visit.
- Drive-By Appraisal: $575 — Exterior-only inspection with photographs. Includes property condition notes and full market analysis.
- Standard (Single Family): $625 — Full interior and exterior inspection with detailed property photographs. Complete narrative appraisal report.
- Desktop (2–4 Unit): $550 — Multi-unit records-based valuation with separate unit analysis. No property visit.
- Standard (2–4 Unit): $725 — Multi-unit full interior and exterior inspection. Separate unit analysis and complete narrative report.

## Services
- [Date of Death Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/date-of-death-appraisals.html): Date of death appraisals for estate settlement, IRS tax reporting, and stepped-up basis in Temecula and across Riverside County. Certified appraiser, 20+ years experience.
- [Divorce Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/divorce-appraisals.html): Neutral, court-accepted divorce appraisals for family law matters in Temecula and Riverside County. Over 1,000 divorce appraisals completed. Two-client discount available.
- [Estate & Trust Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/estate-trust-appraisals.html): Probate, trust distribution, and estate appraisals in Temecula and Riverside County. Reports prepared to satisfy probate courts, trustees, attorneys, and beneficiaries.
- [Bankruptcy Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/bankruptcy-appraisals.html): Independent bankruptcy appraisals accepted by trustees and bankruptcy courts in Temecula and Riverside County. Fast, USPAP-compliant residential valuations.
- [Expert Witness & Litigation Support](https://www.temecula.pro/services/expert-witness.html): Qualified expert witness appraisal testimony and litigation support for property disputes, tax appeals, and contested valuations in Riverside County.
- [Pre-Purchase Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/pre-purchase-appraisals.html): Independent pre-purchase appraisals in Temecula and Riverside County. Know a property's true value before you buy and avoid overpaying.
- [Pre-Sale Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/pre-sale-appraisals.html): Pre-sale and pre-listing appraisals in Temecula and Riverside County. Set a realistic asking price and support your list price with an independent valuation.
- [Tax Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/tax-appraisals.html): Property tax appeal and gift tax appraisals in Temecula and Riverside County. Specialized valuations for tax authorities and the IRS.
- [Family Transaction Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/family-transaction-appraisals.html): IRS-compliant family transaction appraisals for family sales, gifts, and transfers in Temecula and Riverside County. Avoid valuation disputes with the IRS.
- [Insurance Dispute Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/insurance-dispute-appraisals.html): Insurance claim and coverage dispute appraisals in Temecula and Riverside County. Independent valuations that address policy limits and help resolve claims.
- [Bail Bond Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/bail-bond-appraisals.html): Bail bond property appraisals in Temecula and Riverside County. Reports accepted by courts and bonding companies to verify real estate equity for bail collateral.
- [Immigration Appraisals](https://www.temecula.pro/services/immigration-appraisals.html): Immigration appraisals for USCIS petitions, visa applications, and residency proceedings in Temecula and Riverside County. Reports meet federal documentation requirements.
